title: Solarpunk GUI
body:
## 🪴 CONTENTS:

This resource pack changes parts of the Minecraft GUI to an overgrown solarpunk theme!
- Features a warm color palette with leafy vine accents.
- This theme changes the hotbar, HUD icons (hearts & hunger), the XP bar, and crafting containers.
- Will try to do updates in the future for menu buttons, creative mode containers, and everything else in the GUI.


## 💡 NOTES:

Made for the current listed version of Minecraft. With previous versions, unfortunately some parts of crafting containers are misaligned or disappear entirely.

Does not require any mods in order to function!

Feel free to add this to your modpacks if you'd like! All I ask for is to be given credit. :)

## 🖼️ PREVIEWS:

![This gif cycles between the different solarpunk themed crafting containers for Minecraft.](https://i.imgur.com/WEdYkI4.gif)

![The solarpunk themed MInecraft HUD changes between different health states like withered, poisoned, frozen, etc.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38e01373309dc90177f6f5ebed7fe92314eafbea.gif)
